description: Kiro hooks configuration for ai-code toolkit

hooks.name: Auto-format on file edit
hooks.description: Automatically format code files when edited

then.prompt: The file was just edited. Please check if it needs formatting and apply the project's code formatter if needed.

hooks.name: Warn about console.log
hooks.description: Warn when console.log is added to production code

then.prompt: Check if console.log statements were added. If found, remind to remove them before committing to production.

hooks.name: Security check on commit-related prompts
hooks.description: Run security checklist when user mentions commit/push/deploy

then.prompt: If the user is about to commit, push, or deploy code, remind them to review the security checklist in .kiro/steering/security-checklist.md

hooks.name: Session summary on stop
hooks.description: Provide a brief summary when the session ends

then.prompt: Provide a brief summary of what was accomplished in this session and any pending tasks.
